messages.content: 检查语法：The reduction peaks all shift to a higher temperature, implying a high proportion of NiO that exhibits strong interaction with the supports are formed by improving the metal dispersion.
The reduction peaks all shift to a higher temperature, implying that a high proportion of NiO, which exhibits strong interaction with the supports, is formed by improving the metal dispersion.
简洁一些
The shift of reduction peaks to a higher temperature suggests that a higher proportion of NiO with strong interaction to the supports is formed by improving metal dispersion.
简洁一些：The former catalyst exhibits the i-hexane generation rate of 2.1e-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1 which is 1.2 and nearly 2.8-fold higher than the 11.7 nm ones, respectively.
The previous catalyst shows a higher i-hexane generation rate of 2.1e-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1 compared to the 11.7 nm catalyst, which is 1.2 and nearly 2.8 times higher.
简洁一些：The former catalyst exhibits the i-hexane generation rate of 2.1e-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1 which is 1.2 and nearly 2.8-fold higher than the latter ones, respectively.
The previous catalyst shows a higher i-hexane generation rate of 2.1e-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1 compared to the latter catalysts, which are 1.2 and nearly 2.8 times lower, respectively.

英文降重：Mortensen et al.[18] studied the effects of the Ni particle size of Ni/SiO2 catalyst in the hydrodeoxygenation of phenol. They found that smaller metal particles with step/corner sites favor deoxygenation reactions, resulting in higher deoxygenation rates.

Mortensen et al. [18] investigated the influence of Ni particle size in Ni/SiO2 catalyst on the hydrodeoxygenation of phenol. Their study showed that smaller metal particles with step/corner sites promote deoxygenation reactions, resulting in increased deoxygenation rates.
再变化一下

In their study, Mortensen et al. [18] examined the Ni particle size impact on the hydrodeoxygenation of phenol with Ni/SiO2 catalyst. The results revealed that the smaller metal particles with step/corner sites accelerated deoxygenation reactions, leading to higher deoxygenation rates.
英语降重：The variation in TOF with Ni particle size is shown in Fig. 10a. It is found that the TOF monotonously declines with increasing Ni particle size.
Figure 10a illustrates how the TOF changes with Ni particle size, indicating a consistent decrease in TOF as the Ni particle size increases.
英语降重：The variation in TOF with Ni particle size is shown in Fig. 10a.
Figure 10a displays the change in TOF as the Ni particle size is varied.
英文翻译：Fig10表明了TOF随金属粒径变化的趋势图
Figure 10 illustrates the trend of TOF as the metal particle size varies.
英文降重：It is found that the TOF monotonously declines with increasing Ni particle size.
The study observed a consistent decrease in TOF as the Ni particle size increases.
句里不要反复出现increase：The ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane increased from 0.025 to 0.053 upon increasing the Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm.
The Ni NPs increase from 5.3 to 11.7 nm resulted in an increased ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane, rising from 0.025 to 0.053.
更改句式，不要都用increase：The ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane increased from 0.025 to 0.053 upon increasing the Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm.
With the increase of Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm, the ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane rose from 0.025 to 0.053.
